case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, L.P. ALSO DOING VS. LUONG HONG NGOC et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, L.P. ALSO DOING BUSINESS AS FILLMORE PROPERTIES,L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGOC, LUONG HONG AKA NGOC HONG LUONG VINH, HUY MAI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1410 STEINER STREET, APARTMENT #311, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, L.P. ALSO DOING BUSINESS AS FILLMORE PROPERTIES,L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT NGOC, LUONG HONG AKA NGOC HONG LUONG VINH, HUY MAI DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NGOC, LUONG HONG AKA NGOC HONG LUONG VINH, HUY MAI

DECLARATION TODD ROTHBARD FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, L.P. ALSO DOING BUSINESS AS FILLMORE PROPERTIES,L.L.C.
